title: Private's Progress
writer: Alan Hackney, Frank Harvey, John Boulting
actors: Ian Carmichael, Ronald Adam, Henry B. Longhurst
plot: In World War II, a failed British officer is selected by his uncle, a brigadier with the War Office, to participate in a secret operation to recover looted artwork from the Germans.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
